nodes.name: Hourly Schedule
nodes.notes: Runs every hour from 9AM to 5PM, Monday-Friday (EST)

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.value: contains(subject, 'STR | Confirm ID') and isRead eq false

nodes.name: Fetch Unread Trip Emails
nodes.notes: Gets unread emails with 'STR | Confirm ID' in subject via Microsoft Graph API

nodes.name: Any New Emails?
nodes.notes: Checks if any unread trip emails were found

nodes.name: Split Email List
nodes.notes: Splits the email array so each email is processed individually

nodes.name: Log Email Details
nodes.notes: Displays email subject, date, and attachment status for visibility

nodes.name: Get Email Attachments
nodes.notes: Fetches all attachments for this email from Microsoft Graph

nodes.name: Find Securedoc Attachment
nodes.notes: Identifies the 'securedoc' HTML file from the attachment list

nodes.name: Send to Render Processor
nodes.notes: Sends messageId + attachmentId to Render. Processor fetches HTML, runs Puppeteer, extracts PDF fields, uploads to Drive.

nodes.name: Processing OK?
nodes.notes: Checks if the Render processor returned success

nodes.name: Log Trip Fields
nodes.notes: Shows extracted trip data: Confirm ID, Trip Code, destination, school, dates, student count

nodes.name: Format Sheet Row
nodes.notes: Builds single row with students as comma-separated arrays (columns R-U)

nodes.name: Write to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends one row per student to trip_details tab (columns A-X)

nodes.name: No New Emails
nodes.notes: Logs when no unread trip emails are found

nodes.name: Processing Failed
nodes.notes: Logs error details when the Render processor fails. Email stays unread for retry.
